name: Q-11 PR with --invocations-count 0 scores zero on the invocation_observability component
command: printf '%s' '{"commit":"abc"}' > manifest.json && : > drift.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-quality-scorecard.sh" --pr-sha abc --manifest manifest.json --adrs-csv 'ADR-1' --drift-findings drift.jsonl --invocations-count 0 --format json > out.json && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.components.invocation_observability===0?0:1)' && echo zero 1>&2
